description:
Select input with options.
 Maps to Select or Listbox in @dtkt/ui/select or @dtkt/ui/listbox
 Use CEL expressions to generate select options.
 The message or field is available as `this` in the expression context.
 Example options: `this.available_items`

^(item_field)$.description: Field name to be used as the option value.

^(label_field)$.description: Field name to be used as the option label.

^(option_key)$.description:
CEL expression for option keys.
 Context: `this` is the message or field being rendered.

^(option_value)$.description:
CEL expression for option values.
 Context: `this` is the message or field being rendered.

itemField.description: Field name to be used as the option value.

labelField.description: Field name to be used as the option label.

optionKey.description:
CEL expression for option keys.
 Context: `this` is the message or field being rendered.

optionValue.description:
CEL expression for option values.
 Context: `this` is the message or field being rendered.

title: Select
